name: Hermes Sandbox
postCreateCommand:
HERMES_SKIP_SETUP=1 bash -c 'curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent/main/scripts/install.sh | bash' && source ~/.bashrc && python3 -c "
import yaml, os
patch_path = '/workspaces/hermes-sandbox/.devcontainer/hermes-config-patch.yaml'
config_path = os.path.expanduser('~/.hermes/config.yaml')
with open(patch_path) as f:
    patch = yaml.safe_load(f)
with open(config_path) as f:
    config = yaml.safe_load(f)
config.update(patch)
with open(config_path, 'w') as f:
    yaml.dump(config, f, default_flow_style=False)
print('✅ Hermes config patch applied (MCP + model + personalities)')
" && echo '✅ Hermes ready!'
postStartCommand: bash -c 'source ~/.bashrc && if command -v hermes >/dev/null 2>&1; then nohup hermes gateway > /tmp/hermes-gateway.log 2>&1 & echo "✅ Hermes gateway starting"; else echo "ℹ️  Run hermes setup first"; fi'
